Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.AngularAccelerationUnit

      AngularAccelerationUnit AngularAccelerationFormatter.findUnit(String source)
      Attempts to determine an angular acceleration unit within a measurement string representation.
      static AngularAccelerationUnit AngularAccelerationUnit.valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static AngularAccelerationUnit[] AngularAccelerationUnit.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type AngularAccelerationUnit 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void AngularAcceleration.add(double value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and updates current angular acceleration instance.
      static double AngularAcceleration.add(double value1, AngularAccelerationUnit unit1, double value2, AngularAccelerationUnit unit2, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two angular acceleration values and units and returns the result.

      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and updates current angulasr acceleration instance.
      static Number AngularAcceleration.add(Number value1, AngularAccelerationUnit unit1, Number value2, AngularAccelerationUnit unit2, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds two angular acceleration values and units and returns the result.
      static AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew(AngularAcceleration arg1, AngularAcceleration arg2, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds two angular accelerations.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew(AngularAcceleration a, AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration to current instance and returns a new angular acceleration.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew(double value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAcceleration.addAndReturnNew(Number value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, AngularAccelerationUnit resultUnit)
      Adds provided angular acceleration value and unit and returns a new angular acceleration instance using provided unit.
      static void AngularAccelerationConverter.convert(AngularAcceleration angularAcceleration, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      static void AngularAccelerationConverter.convert(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit, AngularAcceleration result)
      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      static double AngularAccelerationConverter.convert(double input, AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angular acceleration value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Number AngularAccelerationConverter.convert(Number input, AngularAccelerationUnit inputUnit, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angle value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static AngularAcceleration AngularAccelerationConverter.convertAndReturnNew(AngularAcceleration input, AngularAccelerationUnit outputUnit)
      Converts an angular acceleration to requested output unit.
      String AngularAccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvert(Number value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided angular acceleration value and unit using metric system.
      String AngularAccelerationFormatter.getUnitSymbol(AngularAccelerationUnit unit)
      Returns unit string representation.

      Subtracts provided angular acceleration value and unit and updates current angular acceleration instance.
